message:
feat(frankensearch): TwoTierConfig::validate + runtime override of optimized_params.toml path

Two tied-together changes: `TwoTierConfig` gains a runtime validator, and
`TwoTierSearcher::new` now calls it and warns on invalid configuration.

1. `TwoTierConfig::validate(&self) -> Result<(), SearchError>` (new, in
   frankensearch-core/src/config.rs). Checks the main runtime knobs for
   degenerate values that would otherwise silently ruin search quality or
   panic later:

     * `candidate_multiplier >= 1` — 0 would short-circuit the candidate
       pool to empty.
     * `rrf_k > 0.0` and finite — RRF fusion divides by `k + rank`; 0,
       NaN, or infinity break the score.
     * `quality_weight in [0.0, 1.0]` and finite — out-of-range values
       make the two-tier blend non-convex and produce nonsense rankings.
     * `quality_timeout_ms >= 10` — sub-10ms timeouts starve the
       quality-tier embedder before it returns anything.
     * When `graph_ranking_enabled`, `graph_ranking_weight in [0.0, 1.0]`
       and finite — same convexity constraint as `quality_weight`.

   All errors come back as
   `SearchError::InvalidConfig { field, value, reason }`, which is the
   existing "config refused; cannot start" variant (documented at the
   top of `error.rs`).

2. `TwoTierConfig::optimized` (same file). Previously it hard-coded the
   `optimized_params.toml` path to
   `{CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR}/../../data/optimized_params.toml`, which is
   fine for `cargo run` inside the workspace but fails for installed
   binaries (the manifest dir points at the *build-time* location, not
   the install location). Added two earlier search paths that are
   checked in order:

     a. `<exe_dir>/../data/optimized_params.toml` — the standard layout
        for a `bin/foo` + `data/` install tree (rustup-style, or a
        packaged tarball).
     b. `<cwd>/data/optimized_params.toml` — the "I'm running from a
        checkout or a staged data dir" case.

   The old CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR path is kept as the final fallback so
   in-workspace usage still works. `from_optimized_file` is unchanged.

3. `TwoTierSearcher::new` (frankensearch-fusion/src/searcher.rs). On
   construction, the config is now run through `config.validate()` and
   any error is logged via `tracing::warn!` with the error message and
   a note that "search behavior may be degenerate". Deliberately kept
   as a warning rather than a hard failure: `new` already commits to
   non-fallible construction of the searcher, and callers that want to
   reject invalid config can call `config.validate()` themselves and
   surface the error upstream. The warning ensures nobody is silently
   running with `rrf_k = 0.0` for an hour before noticing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
